title: Cookie Run Kingdom Weapons
description: Custom model resource pack adding various Cookie Run: Kingdom weapons into Minecraft.
body:
Becca's Cookie Run Kingdom Weapons Pack! Endorsed by my multiple CRK mutuals who encouraged me to keep adding their favorites.

Check gallery for photos of the models!

Vanilla resource pack using item components! It changes nothing at first, but renaming items (or using commands) will change the item's model to the custom one. Works for 1.21.2-1.21.5+, but survival-friendly ONLY for 1.21.5+ due to item-renaming changing model being added in that version. The models are avaliable for earlier versions, but are only accessible through commands.


<details>
<summary>
Survival-Friendly Renaming</summary>

Will work for any sword
- Pure Vanilla Staff
- White Lily Staff
- Golden Cheese Spear
- Dark Cacao Sword
- Shadow Milk Wand
- Red Velvet Sword
- Wildberry Gauntlet
- Burning Spice Parashu
- Doughael Staff
- Elder Faerie Sword
- Fire Spirit Staff
- Moonlight Staff
- Hound Knight Spoon
- Salt Cellar Mace
- Sea Fairy Sword
- Silent Salt Sword
- Stormbringer Heavensplitter

Shield
- Hollyberry Shield
- Hound Knight Shield

Bow
- Wind Archer Bow
- Rye Pistol Dark
- Rye Pistol Light

Crossbow
- Rye Pistol Dark
- Rye Pistol Light

Any Axe
- Burning Spice Parashu
- Cookie Axe

Any Pickaxe
- Cookie Pickaxe

Blue Wool
- Cakehound Plush

</details>

<details>
<summary>Command Summoning</summary>
/give @p ANY_ITEM_YOU_WANT[item_model:"becca:json_filename"]

- crk_white_lily_staff
- crk_pure_vanilla_staff
- crk_golden_cheese_spear
- crk_dark_cacao_sword
- crk_hollyberry_shield
- crk_smilk_wand
- crk_red_velvet_sword
- crk_wildberry_gauntlet
- crk_axe
- crk_burning_spice_parashu
- crk_cakehound_plush
- crk_doughael_fork
- crk_elder_faerie_sword
- crk_fire_spirit_staff
- crk_hound_knight_shield
- crk_hound_knight_spoon
- crk_moonlight_staff
- crk_picaxe (mind the misspelling (oops))
- crk_salt_cellar_mace
- crk_sea_fairy_sword
- crk_silent_salt_sword
- crk_wind_archer_bow
- crk_stormbringer_heavensplitter
- crk_rye_pistol_dark
- crk_rye_pistol_light

</details>
